title: Eisenstein FAIL: demonstrates a wrong Z value breaking F²-FW+W²=Z²
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture (added 2026-07-06 to close a fixture-coverage gap -- this family previously had zero FAIL fixtures). Plants a deterministically detectable violation: fundamental (b,e,d,a)=(1,1,2,3) declares Z=8 instead of the correct Z=e*e+a*d=1+6=7, breaking F²-FW+W²=Z².
